name: Task Force 141
description:
Call of Hunger

Price (37, District 7): Foreman from the forests, calm, strategic, and unshakable under pressure.

Soap (26, District 4): Rugged coast fisherman, fast, charming, irreverent, and resourceful. Humor masks deadly instincts.

Ghost (28, District 12): Coal district shadow, disciplined, pragmatic, and fiercely loyal. Silent, observant, lethal.

Gaz (27, District 2): Stoneworker turned Peacekeeper trainee, calculated, patient, precise, and skeptical. Always sees the bigger picture.
creator: _NeoBee34_
